subcodes.first_line: Upon thee be the Glory of God and His effulgence, O thou whose heart is set ablaze with the fire of the love of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: علیک بهاء الله و ضیائه یا من اشتعل قلبه من نار محبه الله
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @wisdom [hikmat], @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @order; organization; tact; deliberation [tadbir]
